# Vendored libraries (MIT)
- cytoscape.min.js — Cytoscape.js 3.30.2 (MIT)
- dagre.min.js — dagre 0.8.5 (MIT)
- cytoscape-dagre.min.js — cytoscape-dagre 2.5.0 (MIT)
- layout-base.min.js — layout-base 2.0.1 (MIT)
- cose-base.min.js — cose-base 2.2.0 (MIT)
- cytoscape-fcose.min.js — cytoscape-fcose 2.2.0 (MIT)

Committed for offline, self-contained rendering. Load order: cytoscape → dagre →
cytoscape-dagre → layout-base → cose-base → cytoscape-fcose.
